title: Rise & Shine: The Jay DeMerit Story
original_title: Rise & Shine: The Jay DeMerit Story
overview: A documentary on the rise of professional soccer player Jay DeMerit from being overlooked in the U.S. to struggling in England to World Cup player recognition.
